nasb.text: Abraham took the wood of the burnt offering and laid it on Isaac his son, and he took in his hand the fire and the knife. So the two of them walked on together.

esv.text: And Abraham took the wood of the burnt offering and laid it on Isaac his son. And he took in his hand the fire and the knife. So they went both of them together.

cnv.text: 亞伯拉罕把獻燔祭的柴，放在他兒子以撒的身上，自己手裡拿著火與刀。他們二人一起向前走的時候，

ccb.text: 于是，亚伯拉罕把献燔祭用的柴放在儿子以撒肩上，自己手里拿着火种和刀。父子二人一同向前走。

csbs.text: 亚伯拉罕拿起燔祭用的木柴，放在他儿子以撒身上，自己手中拿着火和刀；他们两人就一同前行。
